entries.author: St. Ambrose of Milan
entries.title: AMMINADAB MEANS “FATHER OF A PEOPLE.”
entries.body: It made me like the chariots of Aminadab, which name means the father of a people. Now he that is a father of a people is likewise the father of Nahashon, which is of the serpent. Now recall who hung like a serpent upon the cross for the salvation of all men, and you will understand that the soul is at peace that has God as its protector and Christ as its captain. {fn:0}

pericopes.pericopeTitle: COUNT AND ARRANGEMENT OF THE TWELVE TRIBES

entries.author: Origen of Alexandria
entries.title: THE LEVITES WERE MORE EXCELLENT.
entries.body: We gather from the book of Numbers that there may be something greater than Israel too. For there the whole of Israel is numbered and reckoned in twelve tribes, as under a fixed number. But the tribe of Levi, being of greater eminence than the others, is accounted extra to this number and never thought of as being one of Israel’s number [of twelve]. {fn:0}
entries.citation: Commentary on the Song of Songs, Prologue
